## Feature description

Describe the feature you would like to see.

## Why would this be useful?

Explain the problem this feature would solve or why it would improve the project.

## Possible implementation

Optional: Describe how you imagine the feature working.

## Additional information

Add screenshots, examples or other information if relevant.
